chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D-6224 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. 27651/2024 2. For hearing of Misc. 27652/2024 3. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Mr. Mujtaba Sohail Raja, advocate for the petitioner. M/s Muhammad Omer Soomro and Abdul Haseeb Qazi, advocate for respondent 8. Syed Hussain Shah, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Learned counsel for the petitioner adverts to statement dated 15.02.2025, statement is accompanied by a notice dated 24.01.2025 with respect to cancellation of NIT. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that in view of the cancellation notice, the petition has become infructuous and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge M. Khan
